title: Cirrhopetalum stramineum

It is a relatively rare species, and its classification helps in understanding its unique characteristics and habits. The Orchidaceae family contains over 30,000 known species, and Cirrhopetalum stramineum is just one of the many fascinating species within this diverse group.
